text: “Ability to respond in damages” means financial responsibility.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 102

“Ability to respond in damages” means financial responsibility.

*(Added by renumbering Section 95 by Stats. 1992, Ch. 974, Sec. 2. Effective September 28, 1992.)*

subsections.text: “Ability to respond in damages” means financial responsibility.
